name: Google Chrome
description: Dominant web browser with V8 engine, massive extension library, and deep Google service integration.

name: Firefox
description: Privacy-focused open-source browser by Mozilla. Container tabs, tracking protection, and strong extension support.

name: Safari
description: Apple's browser. Best battery life on Mac, tight ecosystem integration, and strong privacy defaults.

name: Brave
description: Chromium-based browser with built-in ad/tracker blocking, optional crypto rewards, and Tor integration.

name: Arc
description: Reimagined browser by The Browser Company. Sidebar tabs, spaces, split views, and built-in tools.

name: Vivaldi
description: Highly customizable Chromium browser. Tab stacking, built-in mail/calendar, and a focus on power users.

name: Microsoft Edge
description: Microsoft's Chromium-based browser. Good performance, vertical tabs, and collections for research.

name: Discord
description: Voice, video, and text chat for communities. Servers, channels, threads, bots, and screen sharing.

name: Slack
description: Workplace messaging with channels, threads, integrations, and workflow automations.

name: Microsoft Teams
description: Workplace communication hub with chat, video meetings, file sharing, and Office 365 integration.

name: Telegram
description: Cloud-based messenger with large groups, channels, bots, and fast file sharing. 2GB file uploads.

name: Signal
description: End-to-end encrypted messenger. Open-source, privacy-first, with disappearing messages and sealed sender.

name: Element
description: Matrix client for decentralized, end-to-end encrypted communication. Self-hostable and federated.

name: Zoom
description: Video conferencing platform. Reliable meetings, webinars, screen sharing, and breakout rooms.

name: Mullvad VPN
description: Privacy-first VPN. No email required, anonymous accounts, accepts cash. Audited and transparent.

name: Proton VPN
description: VPN by Proton. Free tier with no data limits, Swiss jurisdiction, and Secure Core servers.

name: Tailscale
description: Zero-config mesh VPN built on WireGuard. Connect your devices and servers in a private network.

name: WireGuard
description: Modern VPN protocol. Extremely simple, fast, and lean. Built into the Linux kernel.

name: NordVPN
description: Popular consumer VPN with a large server network, double VPN, and dedicated IP options.

name: Chess.com
description: Largest online chess platform. Play, learn, solve puzzles, and watch tournaments. Huge community.

name: Lichess
description: Free, open-source chess server. No ads, no paywalls. Analysis board, puzzles, and tournaments.

name: Chessable
description: Chess learning platform using spaced repetition. Master openings, tactics, and endgames with science-backed methods.

name: Stockfish
description: Strongest open-source chess engine. Used for analysis in virtually every chess tool and platform.

name: Arena Chess GUI
description: Free chess GUI for Windows. Supports UCI/WinBoard engines, databases, and tournament organization.

name: qBittorrent
description: Free, open-source BitTorrent client. Clean interface, no ads, built-in search, and sequential downloading.

name: Transmission
description: Lightweight, open-source BitTorrent client. Minimal resource usage with a clean, simple interface.

name: Deluge
description: Free, open-source BitTorrent client with a plugin system. Runs as daemon with web UI or desktop client.

name: rTorrent
description: Terminal-based BitTorrent client for power users. Lightweight, scriptable, often paired with ruTorrent web UI.

name: BiglyBT
description: Feature-rich, open-source BitTorrent client. Swarm merging, I2P support, and detailed torrent analytics.

name: uTorrent
description: Compact BitTorrent client. Once the most popular torrent app, now ad-supported with a web-based version.

name: Waterfox
description: Privacy-focused Firefox fork. Supports legacy Firefox extensions, disables telemetry, and offers more user control.

name: Zen Browser
description: Firefox-based browser focused on privacy and customization. Sidebar tabs, split views, and a clean modern interface.

name: Floorp
description: Customizable Firefox-based browser from Japan. Vertical tabs, workspaces, flexible toolbar, and strong privacy defaults.

name: WhatsApp
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging app by Meta. Text, voice, video calls, groups, and file sharing for billions of users.

name: Threema
description: Privacy-focused messenger from Switzerland. No phone number required, end-to-end encrypted, and independently audited.

name: Wire
description: Secure collaboration platform with end-to-end encryption. Messaging, calls, file sharing, and guest rooms for teams.

name: ExpressVPN
description: Premium VPN service with servers in 105 countries. Fast speeds, TrustedServer technology, and split tunneling.

name: Surfshark
description: Budget-friendly VPN with unlimited device connections. CleanWeb ad blocker, MultiHop, and Nexus server network.

name: IVPN
description: Privacy-focused VPN based in Gibraltar. Open-source apps, no email required to sign up, and transparency reports.

name: SCID vs. PC
description: Free chess database and analysis tool. Manage PGN databases, run engine analysis, and study games offline.

name: CuteChess
description: Cross-platform chess GUI for engine tournaments and matches. Supports UCI and XBoard protocols with PGN output.

name: Lucas Chess
description: Free chess training program with many built-in engines. Progressive difficulty, tactics training, and game analysis.

name: Tixati
description: Lightweight BitTorrent client with detailed bandwidth management. No ads, DHT, and advanced per-torrent settings.

name: aria2
description: Lightweight multi-protocol download utility. Supports HTTP, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent, and Metalink with JSON-RPC control.

name: Private Internet Access
description: VPN service with open-source apps, MACE ad blocker, and configurable encryption. Large server fleet.

name: CyberGhost VPN
description: User-friendly VPN with optimized servers for streaming and torrenting. 100+ country locations.

name: Windscribe
description: VPN and ad-blocker combo with a generous free tier of 10GB/month. Browser extension and desktop clients.

name: Vuze
description: Feature-rich BitTorrent client with device playback, media search, and remote web access. Formerly Azureus.

name: PicoTorrent
description: Tiny, fast BitTorrent client for Windows. Native UI, IPv6 support, and very low resource usage.
